LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER VICTOR HRABE'S PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM THE REQUIREMENTS OF GOVERNMENT CODE 945.4 (GVT CODE 946.6). THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED BASED ON EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, COURT REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998
